description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a prominent cylindrical barrel and an under-barrel tube, likely for ammunition storage. The body is constructed from dark metal with red highlights, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. It has a folding stock at the rear, which is thin and angular, providing compactness for urban maneuverability. The grip is textured and ergonomically angled, suggesting comfort and control during use. The top of the shotgun includes a rail system for mounting accessories, and the trigger guard is large and rounded for easy access. The overall build is solid and utilitarian, suitable for high-intensity urban environments.
description: A tactical, dark-metal shotgun with a folding stock, under-barrel tube, and red highlights, featuring a rail system and ergonomic grip. Its robust, modern design is ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical alignment of the shotgun's body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length, folding stock, under-barrel tube, and accessory rail on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the narrow stock and the back of the receiver, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, highlighting the grip, trigger guard, and overall profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with an under-barrel tube, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
